Package com.intergral.fusionreactor.api

Class FRAPI

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.intergral.fusionreactor.api.FRAPI

  • public abstract class FRAPI
extends Object

    This class defines the public interface to FusionReactor.

    All API calls internally check whether FusionReactor is available before proceeding. Storing references to objects produced by this type any longer than strictly necessary (certainly not longer than the course of a single page request) is strongly discouraged, in order to reduce the scope for memory leaks. This object itself may be stored and reused if required.

    This is a factory-type class; you must not instantiate it yourself, rather use the getInstance() method.

    Since:
    1.5 Introduction of type.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static int KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_DISPOSED
      Indicates this request has already been disposed of -- already completed or killed.
      static int KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_NOTIFIED
      Indicates this request has already been notified of a kill action by some other mechanism.
      static int KILL_STATUS_KILLED
      Indicates this request was killed.
      static int KILL_STATUS_NOT_KILLED
      Indicates Guard attempted to kill this request but could not.
      static int KILL_STATUS_UNABLE
      Indicates this request could not be killed because the Intergral APM Guard OSGi Service is not running, or the FusionReactor Guard Component is not available.
      private static Map sharedMap  
      static String TRACE_CONTEXT_ID
      Indicates the Transit context used to store FusionReactor Traces.
      static String TRACE_CONTEXT_NAME
      The name of the Transit property used to store traces.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      FRAPI​()
      The default constructor should not be called publicly.

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createBlankWebRequestTransaction​(boolean trackInMetro)
      Creates a blank WebRequest transaction with no information set.
      abstract void createNumericAggregateGraphSeries​(String seriesId, String seriesName, String seriesShortName, String seriesDescription, String seriesUnit)
      Create a numeric series with extra information.
      abstract void createNumericAggregateSeries​(String seriesId, String seriesName, String seriesShortName, String seriesDescription, String seriesUnit)
      Create a numeric series with extra information.
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.TrackedTransaction createTrackedTransaction​(String flavor)
      Creates a transaction in the APM Transit system.
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createTransaction​(String flavor)
      Creates a transaction in the APM Transit system.
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createWebRequest​(boolean trackInMetro, String requestURL, Map<String,Object> requestAttributes, String requestAuthType, String requestCharacterEncoding, String requestCookies, String requestContentType, String requestContextPath, Integer requestContentLength, Map<String,String> requestHeaders, Locale requestLocale, String requestMethod, Map<String,String[]> requestParameterMap, String requestPathInfo, String requestPathTranslated, String requestProtocol, String requestQueryString, String requestRequestedSessionId, String requestURI, String requestScheme, String requestServletPath, Boolean requestIsSecure, String clientAddress, String clientHostName, Integer clientPort, Integer responseBufferSize, String responseCharacterEncoding, String responseContentType, Map<String,String> responseHeaders, Boolean responseIsCommitted, Integer responseStatusCode)
      Allows for the creation of a WebRequest transaction with all the relevant information.
      abstract boolean deleteLog​(String name)
      Deletes a given logfile.
      abstract void deregisterNotification​(long id)
      Deregister a previously-registered notification.
      abstract void enableCloudMetric​(String seriesId)
      Enables a given metric for transfer to FusionReactor Cloud.
      abstract String explainKillStatus​(int killStatus)
      Explain a given kill result value.
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction getActiveMasterTransaction​()
      Get the master (root) transaction on this thread.
      abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction getActiveTransaction​()
      Get the current transaction on this thread.
      abstract long getAllocatedMemory​()
      Get the quantity of memory allocated to the JVM by the operating system.
      abstract String getClientId​()
      Returns the current client ID.
      abstract short getCpuUsage​()
      Get the current CPU usage.
      abstract File getCurrentLogDirectory​()
      Get the location of the current FusionReactor log directory.
      abstract File getCurrentLogFolder​()
      Get the location of the current FusionReactor log folder.
      abstract long getDeepObjectSize​(Object objectToSize)
      Returns an implementation-specific approximation of the total amount of storage consumed by the specified object by summing the storage recursively of it's fields.
      abstract long getFreeMemory​()
      Get the quantity of free memory available to the VM, including any not yet allocated.
      abstract IVersion getFRVersion​()
      Returns an implementation of the IVersion interface to expose FusionReactor version information.
      static FRAPI getInstance​()
      Get a concrete instance of the FusionReactor API, on which further calls can be made.
      abstract ILicenseState getLicenseState​()
      Returns state information for license.
      abstract File getLogfile​(String name)
      Gets a File object representing the named log.
      abstract int getLogFileVersion​()
      Get a string containing the version of the log files.
      abstract long getNextRotationTime​()
      Get the next rotation time.
      abstract long getObjectSize​(Object objectToSize)
      Returns an implementation-specific approximation of the amount of storage consumed by the specified object.
      abstract long getProbeInterval​()
      Gets the interval, in milliseconds, of the internal resource-gathering probes.
      abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate[] getRecentRequests​()
      Query FusionReactor for the a list of historic WebRequests currently held by FusionReactor.
      abstract ITransactionSurrogate[] getRecentTransactions​()
      Query FusionReactor for a list of historic transactions currently held by FusionReactor.
      abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate getRequest​(long id)
      Get a request by ID.
      abstract ConfigurationSurrogate getRunningConfiguration​()
      Return a deep clone of the currently running configuration.
      abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate[] getRunningRequests​()
      Return an array containing objects representing all requests currently being tracked by FusionReactor.
      abstract ITransactionSurrogate[] getRunningTransactions​()
      Return an array containing objects representing all transactions currently being tracked by FusionReactor.
      abstract double getSeriesAverage​(String seriesId)
      Get the mean value of the currently-held values for the series.
      abstract double getSeriesCount​(String seriesId)
      Get the count of values currently held for this series.
      abstract double getSeriesSum​(String seriesId)
      Get the sum of the values currently held for this series.
      static Map getSharedMap​()
      Non-api: clients must not call this method.
      abstract ISignalState getSignalState​()
      Returns state information for data shipping.
      abstract long getStartedAt​()
      Returns the Java epoch time at which the system was started.
      abstract long getStartTime​()
      Get the time in milliseconds since the epoch at which the server was started.
      abstract String getStartTimeString​()
      Get the system uptime as a date/time string of the form HH:mm:ss dd-MMM-yyyy
      abstract long getTotalMemory​()
      Get the quantity of memory available to the JVM, including any not yet allocated to it by the JVM.
      abstract String getUemTrackingScript​()
      Gets a set of JavaScript that can be injected into a page to provide User Experience, Management and Tracking metrics for FusionReactor's transaction engine.
      abstract long getUptime​()
      Get the number of milliseconds since FusionReactor was last started.
      abstract long getUsedMemory​()
      Get the quantity of memory currently allocated by the JVM to Java objects.
      abstract String getUserCookieName​()
      Gets the name of the cookie used for authentication.
      abstract String getUserCookieValue​(String role, String password)
      Gets the value of the cookie used for authentication.
      abstract boolean isFusionReactorRunning​()
      Attempt to locate FusionReactor in memory and return a boolean indicating success or failure.
      abstract boolean isInitialized​()
      Gets a boolean indicating whether FR has started up and is ready for FRAPI requests.
      abstract boolean isMemoryProtectionActive​()
      Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Memory Protection feature is enabled.
      abstract boolean isRequestProtectionActive​()
      Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Request Protection feature is enabled.
      abstract boolean isTimeoutProtectionActive​()
      Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Timeout Protection feature is enabled.
      abstract int kill​(long fusionRequestId, String userTraceMarker)
      Kill a running request.
      abstract void log​(String filename, String text)
      Write an INFORMATION entry to a log file.
      abstract void log​(String filename, String level, String text)
      Write a message to a log, with a given level.
      abstract void log​(String filename, String text, String appName, Long timestamp)
      Write an INFORMATION entry to a log file with a transaction ApplicationName.
      abstract void postMetric​(String seriesId, Object payload)
      Post an untyped metric to Metro.

      Post a numeric metric to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on that series.

      Post a numeric metric to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on that series.

      Post a floating point value to a series.
      abstract void postNumericAggregateMetricLong​(String seriesId, long value)
      Post an integral value to a series.
      abstract void postNumericAggregateMetrics​(Map<String,Number> values)
      Post a collection of numeric metrics to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on each series.

      Post a numeric metric to metro.
      abstract void postNumericMetric​(String seriesId, long value)
      Post a numeric metric to metro.

      Post a floating point value to a series.
      abstract void postNumericMetricLong​(String seriesId, long value)
      Post an integral value to a series.

      Sends an event into the OSGi (Plugin) framework.

      Reset the timeout value for this page.

      Set the application name for the master transaction on this thread.
      abstract void setTransactionName​(String name)
      Set the transaction name for the master transaction on this thread.

      Allows setting multiple properties on a transaction.

      Allows setting multiple properties on a transaction without validating arguments.

      Sets a property on a transaction.

      Sets a property on a transaction without validating arguments.

      Set an option on the Java Virtual Machine.

      Attach an object to this request as a trace element.

      Unsubscribe a given handler from the OSGi event system.

      Gets a boolean indicating whether FR was shutdown cleanly last time.

    • Field Detail

      • KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_DISPOSED

        public static final int KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_DISPOSED
        Indicates this request has already been disposed of -- already completed or killed.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_NOTIFIED

        public static final int KILL_STATUS_ALREADY_NOTIFIED
        Indicates this request has already been notified of a kill action by some other mechanism.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • KILL_STATUS_KILLED

        public static final int KILL_STATUS_KILLED
        Indicates this request was killed.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • KILL_STATUS_UNABLE

        public static final int KILL_STATUS_UNABLE
        Indicates this request could not be killed because the Intergral APM Guard OSGi Service is not running, or the FusionReactor Guard Component is not available.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • KILL_STATUS_NOT_KILLED

        public static final int KILL_STATUS_NOT_KILLED
        Indicates Guard attempted to kill this request but could not. This probably indicates the thread was executing native code, which can't be killed by Java.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • TRACE_CONTEXT_ID

        public static final String TRACE_CONTEXT_ID
        Indicates the Transit context used to store FusionReactor Traces.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • TRACE_CONTEXT_NAME

        public static final String TRACE_CONTEXT_NAME
        The name of the Transit property used to store traces.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • sharedMap

        private static Map sharedMap

    • Constructor Detail

      • FRAPI

        public FRAPI​()
        The default constructor should not be called publicly. Instances of this class should only be returned by getInstance().

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static final FRAPI getInstance​()

        Get a concrete instance of the FusionReactor API, on which further calls can be made.

        Returns:
        a concrete FusionReactor API instance.
        Since:
        2.0

      • trace

        public abstract void trace​(String traceString)

        Attach a user trace string to this request. These strings are available within the FusionReactor GUI in the Request Details page, and also appear in the FusionReactor debug console.

        If FusionReactor is not running, this method does nothing.

        Parameters:
        traceString - The string to be attached to this request.
        Since:
        2.0, 5.0 Trace strings are logged to the master transaction (in most cases the web request), in the context TRACE_CONTEXT_ID.

      • trace

        public abstract void trace​(Object object)

        Attach an object to this request as a trace element. The semantics of this method are the same as trace(String), except that the object is attached to the request instead of a string.

        When FusionReactor displays the object, it will use the Object.toString() method to produce a string for display.

        Caution: because of the way Traces are now implemented (as Transit Contexts), the lifetime of this object cannot be easily calculated. You should therefore ensure that the object has as few efferent references as possible.

        Parameters:
        object - the object to be attached to this request for tracing.
        Since:
        5.0

      • isFusionReactorRunning

        public abstract boolean isFusionReactorRunning​()
        Attempt to locate FusionReactor in memory and return a boolean indicating success or failure.
        Returns:
        a boolean indicating whether Fusion Reactor was detected and is running.
        Since:
        2.0

      • setPageTimeout

        public abstract void setPageTimeout​(int seconds)

        Reset the timeout value for this page. If Timeout Protection is not active within FusionReactor, calls to this method have no effect. If Timeout Protection is active, the value passed to this method overrides the value configured in FusionReactor.

        If FusionReactor is not running, this method does nothing.

        Parameters:
        seconds - the timeout in seconds after which this page will be aborted.
        Since:
        2.0

      • getRunningRequests

        public abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate[] getRunningRequests​()

        Return an array containing objects representing all requests currently being tracked by FusionReactor. There is a small time penalty associated with this method, since it must temporarily lock FusionReactor to obtain the list of running requests.

        N.b. By the time your code uses the objects returned by this method, they may have completed.

        Returns:
        an array of IFusionRequestSurrogate objects representing all running tracked requests, or a zero-length array if FusionReactor was not detected.
        Since:
        2.0

      • getRunningTransactions

        public abstract ITransactionSurrogate[] getRunningTransactions​()

        Return an array containing objects representing all transactions currently being tracked by FusionReactor. There is a small time penalty associated with this method, since it must temporarily lock FusionReactor to obtain the list of running transactions.

        N.b. By the time your code uses the objects returned by this method, they may have completed.

        Returns:
        an array of ITransactionSurrogate objects representing all running tracked master/root transactions, or a zero-length array if FusionReactor was not detected.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getRecentRequests

        public abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate[] getRecentRequests​()

        Query FusionReactor for the a list of historic WebRequests currently held by FusionReactor.

        N.b. By the time your code uses the objects returned by this method, they may no longer be in FusionReactor.

        Returns:
        an array of IFusionRequestSurrogate objects representing all requests that are currently held in the FusionReactor history, or null if FusionReactor cannot be found.
        Since:
        5.2.4

      • getRecentTransactions

        public abstract ITransactionSurrogate[] getRecentTransactions​()

        Query FusionReactor for a list of historic transactions currently held by FusionReactor.

        N.b. By the time your code uses the objects returned by this method, they may no longer be in FusionReactor.

        Returns:
        an array of ITransactionSurrogate objects representing all master/root transactions that are currently held in the FusionReactor history, or null if FusionReactor cannot be found.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getRunningConfiguration

        public abstract ConfigurationSurrogate getRunningConfiguration​()
        Return a deep clone of the currently running configuration. It is safe to manipulate this object.
        Returns:
        a ConfigurationSurrogate object constructed as a deep-clone of the running configuration, which may be manipulated safely.
        Since:
        2.0

      • setRequestCaptureFolder

        public abstract void setRequestCaptureFolder​(String fullPath)
                                      throws ConfigurationInvalidExceptionSurrogate,
                                             IOException
        Change the location to which Request Capture will store request and response data. Will cause FusionReactor to restart.
        Parameters:
        fullPath - a full path specifying a folder which exists on the system.
        Throws:
        ConfigurationInvalidExceptionSurrogate - with a descriptive message, if FusionReactor could not adopt the new configuration.
        IOException - if FusionReactor could not open write a new configuration prior to adopting it.
        Since:
        2.0

      • kill

        public abstract int kill​(long fusionRequestId,
                         String userTraceMarker)
        Kill a running request.
        Parameters:
        fusionRequestId - the ID of the request which is to be killed.
        userTraceMarker - if non-null and not an empty string, this trace marker will be stored with the request.
        Returns:
        an integer corresponding to the KILL_STATUS_* set of enumeration defined in this type.
        Since:
        2.0

      • explainKillStatus

        public abstract String explainKillStatus​(int killStatus)
        Explain a given kill result value.
        Parameters:
        killStatus - the status to be explained.
        Returns:
        a concise English sentence explaining the kill status.
        Since:
        2.0

      • getFreeMemory

        public abstract long getFreeMemory​()
        Get the quantity of free memory available to the VM, including any not yet allocated. This value represents the hard upper limit, after which Java will respond to further demand with OutOfMemoryError. This value is commonly influenced using the -Xmx JVM parameter.
        Returns:
        a long representing the quantity of unused memory in bytes.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getTotalMemory

        public abstract long getTotalMemory​()

        Get the quantity of memory available to the JVM, including any not yet allocated to it by the JVM. This value is commonly influenced using the -Xmx JVM parameter.

        Returns:
        a long representing the total quantity of memory available to the JVM in bytes.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getUsedMemory

        public abstract long getUsedMemory​()
        Get the quantity of memory currently allocated by the JVM to Java objects.
        Returns:
        a long representing the total quantity of memory allocated to Java objects in bytes.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getAllocatedMemory

        public abstract long getAllocatedMemory​()
        Get the quantity of memory allocated to the JVM by the operating system. This may vary as the JVM progressively requests and releases memory.
        Returns:
        a long representing the quantity of allocated memory in bytes.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getCpuUsage

        public abstract short getCpuUsage​()

        Get the current CPU usage.

        Returns:
        a short describing the JVMs processor occupancy in percent, across all cores. If CPU sampling is not supported on this platform, -1 is returned.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getStartTime

        public abstract long getStartTime​()
        Get the time in milliseconds since the epoch at which the server was started. The epoch, for Java purposes, is defined as having its datum at midnight, January 1st 1970 UTC.
        Returns:
        the time at which the server was started.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getStartTimeString

        public abstract String getStartTimeString​()
        Get the system uptime as a date/time string of the form HH:mm:ss dd-MMM-yyyy
        Returns:
        a user-friendly representation of the uptime of the system.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • getUptime

        public abstract long getUptime​()
        Get the number of milliseconds since FusionReactor was last started.
        Returns:
        the number of milliseconds since FusionReactor was last started.
        Since:
        2.0.3

      • isRequestProtectionActive

        public abstract boolean isRequestProtectionActive​()
        Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Request Protection feature is enabled.
        Returns:
        a boolean describing the state of Request Protection.
        Since:
        3.2.0

      • isTimeoutProtectionActive

        public abstract boolean isTimeoutProtectionActive​()
        Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Timeout Protection feature is enabled.
        Returns:
        a boolean describing the state of Timeout Protection.
        Since:
        3.2.0

      • isMemoryProtectionActive

        public abstract boolean isMemoryProtectionActive​()
        Get a boolean describing whether Crash Protection's Memory Protection feature is enabled.
        Returns:
        a boolean describing the state of Memory Protection.
        Since:
        3.2.0

      • getLogFileVersion

        public abstract int getLogFileVersion​()
        Get a string containing the version of the log files. This string is incremented when fields are added or removed.
        Returns:
        a String containing the version number of the log files.
        Since:
        3.2.0

      • getRequest

        public abstract IFusionRequestSurrogate getRequest​(long id)
        Get a request by ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID of the request being sought.
        Returns:
        a IFusionRequestSurrogate if the request could be located in the running transaction structure, or the history list. If not, or Transit is not available, null.
        Since:
        1.0, 5.0 The ID is interpreted to be a Transit per-flavor Transaction ID, specifically that of FusionRequest.

      • log

        public abstract void log​(String filename,
                         String level,
                         String text)
        Write a message to a log, with a given level.
        Parameters:
        filename - filename of the log to write to.
        level - one of INFO, WARN or SEVERE. null means a log level will not be written.
        text - text entry to write to the log.

      • log

        public abstract void log​(String filename,
                         String text)
        Write an INFORMATION entry to a log file.
        Parameters:
        filename - filename of the log to write to.
        text - text entry to write to the log.
        Since:
        4.0

      • log

        public abstract void log​(String filename,
                         String text,
                         String appName,
                         Long timestamp)
        Write an INFORMATION entry to a log file with a transaction ApplicationName.
        Parameters:
        filename - filename of the log to write to.
        text - text entry to write to the log.
        appName - ApplicationName of the request log
        timestamp - timestamp of when logging was initiated (only used by FusionRequest#lcLogApp)
        Since:
        9.2.0

      • setVMOption

        public abstract void setVMOption​(String name,
                                 String value)

        Set an option on the Java Virtual Machine.

        Parameters:
        name - name of the option to set.
        value - value for the option.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getStartedAt

        public abstract long getStartedAt​()

        Returns the Java epoch time at which the system was started.

        Returns:
        epoch time when the system started
        Since:
        1.0

      • rotateLogs

        public abstract void rotateLogs​()

        Requests an immediate log rotation.

        Since:
        4.0

      • getProbeInterval

        public abstract long getProbeInterval​()
        Gets the interval, in milliseconds, of the internal resource-gathering probes.
        Returns:
        an interval in milliseconds.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getCurrentLogFolder

        public abstract File getCurrentLogFolder​()
        Get the location of the current FusionReactor log folder. This will change after rotation.
        Returns:
        a File representing the current FR log folder.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getCurrentLogDirectory

        public abstract File getCurrentLogDirectory​()
        Get the location of the current FusionReactor log directory.
        Returns:
        a File representing the current FR log directory.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getNextRotationTime

        public abstract long getNextRotationTime​()
        Get the next rotation time.
        Returns:
        a long representing the next rotation time, as measured since the Java epoch (1.1.1970), or -1 if the rotation task is not active (log engine is in legacy mode) or has stopped.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getUserCookieName

        public abstract String getUserCookieName​()
        Gets the name of the cookie used for authentication.
        Returns:
        a String containing the name of the cookie.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getUserCookieValue

        public abstract String getUserCookieValue​(String role,
                                          String password)
        Gets the value of the cookie used for authentication.
        Parameters:
        role - the role for which a cookie is required, one of "Administrator", "Manager" or "Observer"
        password - the password which will be stored in the cookie
        Returns:
        a cookie enabling passwordless access to FusionReactor.
        Since:
        4.0

      • isInitialized

        public abstract boolean isInitialized​()
        Gets a boolean indicating whether FR has started up and is ready for FRAPI requests.
        Returns:
        a boolean indicating whether FR is initialized and ready for FRAPI.
        Since:
        4.0, 5.0 This method has been updated to check whether the three core OSGi services required by FRAPI are available:
        • Metro, the metric-tracking, aggregation and storage engine,
        • Guard, the system protection engine, and
        • FusionReactor Guard Component, which provides FusionRequest 'kill' functionality to Guard.

      • wasShutdownCleanly

        public abstract boolean wasShutdownCleanly​()
        Gets a boolean indicating whether FR was shutdown cleanly last time.
        Returns:
        true if the system was shutdown cleanly, otherwise false.
        Since:
        4.0

      • getLogfile

        public abstract File getLogfile​(String name)
        Gets a File object representing the named log.
        Parameters:
        name - the named of the log for which a file is required
        Returns:
        a File representing the named log (which may not exist yet)
        Since:
        4.0

      • deleteLog

        public abstract boolean deleteLog​(String name)
        Deletes a given logfile.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the log being deleted.
        Returns:
        true if the log was deleted, otherwise false.
        Since:
        4.0

      • sendOsgiEventAsync

        public abstract boolean sendOsgiEventAsync​(com.intergral.fusionreactor.capi.event.IEvent event)
        Sends an event into the OSGi (Plugin) subsystem. Any bundles subscribed to the topic will receive the event. After the event has been sent, this method returns.

        If no Event Admin service was available in the OSGi framework, the method returns false.

        Parameters:
        event - the event to be placed on the OSGi event bus.
        Returns:
        true if the event was sent.
        Since:
        4.0

      • sendOsgiEventSync

        public abstract com.intergral.fusionreactor.capi.event.IEvent sendOsgiEventSync​(com.intergral.fusionreactor.capi.event.IEvent event,
                                                                                String replyTopic,
                                                                                long timeout)
        Sends an event into the OSGi (Plugin) framework. Any bundles subscribed to the topic will receive the event. The system then waits for a reply on the event bus, with the given topic, waiting for at most timeout milliseconds.

        Any bundle may generate the reply event. If more than one reply event is sent by a bundle, the first one is used.

        Although the method is able to wait indefinitely for a reply, this is strongly discouraged since OSGi bundles can be removed and restarted with no notice.

        Parameters:
        event - the event to be placed on the OSGi event bus.
        replyTopic - the topic of the event to be waited for in reply
        timeout - a timeout value in milliseconds. If no reply is received after this timeout, null is returned. -1 signifies the method should wait indefinitely.
        Returns:
        the event generated in response.
        Since:
        4.0

      • subscribeOsgiEvent

        public abstract void subscribeOsgiEvent​(String topic,
                                        com.intergral.fusionreactor.capi.event.IEventHandler handler)
        Subscribes an IEventHandler within the OSGi plugin subsystem. Whenever a topic is raised with the given passed string, the event handler is called.

        Any bundle may generate the given event. The passed topic may conform to any valid OSGi topic string, i.e. may contain a single trailing wildcard.

        If no Event Admin service was available in the OSGi framework, no events will be raised.

        Parameters:
        topic - the topic being subscribed to.
        handler - an IEventHandler capable of receiving events.
        Since:
        4.0

      • unsubscribeOsgiEvent

        public abstract void unsubscribeOsgiEvent​(com.intergral.fusionreactor.capi.event.IEventHandler handler)
        Unsubscribe a given handler from the OSGi event system.

        If the given handler is not actually subscribed to any events, the method returns immediately.

        Parameters:
        handler - the handler being unsubscribed.
        Since:
        4.0

      • registerNotification

        public abstract long registerNotification​(String title,
                                          String message,
                                          short severity)
        Generate a notification. This is a simplified entry point into the notifications system. These notifications are dismissible by the user using the 'remove' button.
        Parameters:
        title - a terse string containing the title of the notification.
        message - a more verbose string consisting of plain text, describing the notification.
        severity - 0 = INFO, 1 = WARNING, 2 = SEVERE (as defined in INotification
        Returns:
        the FRAPI-tracked ID of this notification. The notification may be deregistered using this ID.
        Since:
        4.0.6

      • registerNotification

        public abstract long registerNotification​(String title,
                                          String message,
                                          short severity,
                                          String origin)
        Version of registerNotification(String, String, short) which allows the client to set the origin string for the notification.
        Parameters:
        origin - a terse string containing the origin of the notification (e.g. page name or application subsystem).
        title - a terse string containing the title of the notification.
        message - a more verbose string consisting of plain text, describing the notification.
        severity - 0 = INFO, 1 = WARNING, 2 = SEVERE (as defined in INotification
        Returns:
        the FRAPI-tracked ID of this notification. The notification may be deregistered using this ID.
        Since:
        4.0.6

      • deregisterNotification

        public abstract void deregisterNotification​(long id)
        Deregister a previously-registered notification.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID supplied as the return value of registerNotification(String, String, short)
        Since:
        4.0.6

      • postMetric

        public abstract void postMetric​(String seriesId,
                                Object payload)
        Post an untyped metric to Metro.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist.
        payload - the object to be posted.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericMetric

        public abstract void postNumericMetric​(String seriesId,
                                       long value)
        Post a numeric metric to metro.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will not have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericMetric

        public abstract void postNumericMetric​(String seriesId,
                                       float value)
        Post a numeric metric to metro.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will not have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericMetricFloat

        public abstract void postNumericMetricFloat​(String seriesId,
                                            float value)
        Post a floating point value to a series. This method is functionally equivalent to postNumericMetric(String, float), but is supplied here to provide an unambiguous signature for scripting languages which automatically select methods incorrectly.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will not have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericMetricLong

        public abstract void postNumericMetricLong​(String seriesId,
                                           long value)
        Post an integral value to a series. This method is functionally equivalent to postNumericMetric(String, long), but is supplied here to provide an unambiguous signature for scripting languages which automatically select methods incorrectly.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will not have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericAggregateMetricFloat

        public abstract void postNumericAggregateMetricFloat​(String seriesId,
                                                     float value)
        Post a floating point value to a series. This method is functionally equivalent to postNumericMetric(String, float), but is supplied here to provide an unambiguous signature for scripting languages which automatically select methods incorrectly.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericAggregateMetricLong

        public abstract void postNumericAggregateMetricLong​(String seriesId,
                                                    long value)
        Post an integral value to a series. This method is functionally equivalent to postNumericMetric(String, long), but is supplied here to provide an unambiguous signature for scripting languages which automatically select methods incorrectly.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericAggregateMetric

        public abstract void postNumericAggregateMetric​(String seriesId,
                                                long value)
        Post a numeric metric to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on that series.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericAggregateMetric

        public abstract void postNumericAggregateMetric​(String seriesId,
                                                float value)
        Post a numeric metric to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on that series.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        value - the value to be tracked.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • postNumericAggregateMetrics

        public abstract void postNumericAggregateMetrics​(Map<String,Number> values)
        Post a collection of numeric metrics to metro, and create a standard set of aggregators on each series.
        Parameters:
        values - the collection of values to post to metro, where the key is the seriesId.
        Since:
        6.0.0

      • createNumericAggregateSeries

        public abstract void createNumericAggregateSeries​(String seriesId,
                                                  String seriesName,
                                                  String seriesShortName,
                                                  String seriesDescription,
                                                  String seriesUnit)
        Create a numeric series with extra information. The seriesId can then be used to post metrics to the series.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric. This will be created if it does not exist. The series will have a standard set of aggregators at 5s, 1m and 1h.
        seriesName - the full name of the series.
        seriesShortName - the short name of the series.
        seriesDescription - the string description of the series
        seriesUnit - the unit for the series. E.g. requests/sec, #, %, empty String for none
        Since:
        9.2.2

      • createNumericAggregateGraphSeries

        public abstract void createNumericAggregateGraphSeries​(String seriesId,
                                                       String seriesName,
                                                       String seriesShortName,
                                                       String seriesDescription,
                                                       String seriesUnit)
        Create a numeric series with extra information. The seriesId can then be used to post metrics to the series.

        Warning! This series will have non-standard aggregators that are meant for series shown in graphs. Advise to use createNumericAggregateSeries(String, String, String, String, String) instead.

        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the series tracking this metric.
        seriesName - the full name of the series.
        seriesShortName - the short name of the series.
        seriesDescription - the string description of the series
        seriesUnit - the unit for the series. E.g. requests/sec, #, %, empty String for none
        Since:
        9.2.2

      • enableCloudMetric

        public abstract void enableCloudMetric​(String seriesId)
        Enables a given metric for transfer to FusionReactor Cloud.

        If this metric does not exist, it will be created as a numeric, aggregating metric. If this metric exists, it must be a numeric, aggregating metric.

        Parameters:
        seriesId - the metric to be transferred
        Since:
        6.0.0

      • getSeriesAverage

        public abstract double getSeriesAverage​(String seriesId)
        Get the mean value of the currently-held values for the series. From the entire life of the series - since it was created (for internal series this will approximate the startup time of the system).
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the series for which a value is required.
        Returns:
        the average of the values held by the series, or -1 if the series does not exist or Metro is not available.
        Since:
        5.0

      • getSeriesCount

        public abstract double getSeriesCount​(String seriesId)
        Get the count of values currently held for this series. From the entire life of the series - since it was created (for internal series this will approximate the startup time of the system).
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the series for which a value is required.
        Returns:
        the count of the values held by the series, or -1 if the series does not exist or Metro is not available.
        Since:
        5.0

      • getSeriesSum

        public abstract double getSeriesSum​(String seriesId)
        Get the sum of the values currently held for this series. From the entire life of the series - since it was created (for internal series this will approximate the startup time of the system).
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the series for which a value is required.
        Returns:
        the total sum of values held by the series, or -1 if the series does not exist or Metro is not available.
        Since:
        5.0

      • getUemTrackingScript

        public abstract String getUemTrackingScript​()
        Gets a set of JavaScript that can be injected into a page to provide User Experience, Management and Tracking metrics for FusionReactor's transaction engine.
        Returns:
        JavaScript code which should be placed inside script tags.
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • createTransaction

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createTransaction​(String flavor)
                                                                         throws com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException,
                                                                                IllegalArgumentException
        Creates a transaction in the APM Transit system. This is a convenience method, and calls new BaseTransaction( flavor ). The transaction flavor will not be tracked in Metro.

        The thrown exception must be handled as Exception, since the GateException hierarchy is not yet exposed in FRAPI.

        Parameters:
        flavor - the type of transaction required.
        Returns:
        a BaseTransaction with the given flavor.
        Throws:
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateTimeoutException - if the transaction timed out while traversing Transit input gates.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateRejectionException - if the transaction was rejected immediately by any Transit input gate.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException - if the transaction couldn't be created due to a Transit transaction gate refusing the request.
        IllegalArgumentException - if the provided flavor is null or an empty string
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • createTrackedTransaction

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.TrackedTransaction createTrackedTransaction​(String flavor)
                                                                                   throws com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException,
                                                                                          IllegalArgumentException
        Creates a transaction in the APM Transit system. This is a convenience method, and calls new BaseTransaction( flavor ). The transaction flavor will be tracked in Metro.

        The thrown exception must be handled as Exception, since the GateException hierarchy is not yet exposed in FRAPI.

        Parameters:
        flavor - the type of transaction required.
        Returns:
        a BaseTransaction with the given flavor.
        Throws:
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateTimeoutException - if the transaction timed out while traversing Transit input gates.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateRejectionException - if the transaction was rejected immediately by any Transit input gate.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException - if the transaction couldn't be created due to a Transit transaction gate refusing the request.
        IllegalArgumentException - if the provided flavor is null or an empty string
        Since:
        5.0.0

      • createBlankWebRequestTransaction

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createBlankWebRequestTransaction​(boolean trackInMetro)
                                                                                        throws com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException
        Creates a blank WebRequest transaction with no information set.

        It is NOT recommended to use this function.

        Only use this function in conjunction with setTransactionProperty(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction, java.lang.String, java.lang.Object) or setTransactionProperties(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction, java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.Object>) to set the WebRequest info with the necessary, WebRequest-specific, property keys.

        It's best that properties are set as early as possible.

        Properties should be set before the transaction is closed to ensure the info is available to transaction processors.

        Parameters:
        trackInMetro - indicates if the transaction should be tracked in Metro
        Returns:
        a BaseTransaction with the WebRequest flavor and no info set
        Throws:
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateTimeoutException - if the transaction timed out while traversing Transit input gates.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateRejectionException - if the transaction was rejected immediately by any Transit input gate.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException - if the transaction couldn't be created due to a Transit transaction gate refusing the request.
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • createWebRequest

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction createWebRequest​(boolean trackInMetro,
                                                                               String requestURL,
                                                                               Map<String,Object> requestAttributes,
                                                                               String requestAuthType,
                                                                               String requestCharacterEncoding,
                                                                               String requestCookies,
                                                                               String requestContentType,
                                                                               String requestContextPath,
                                                                               Integer requestContentLength,
                                                                               Map<String,String> requestHeaders,
                                                                               Locale requestLocale,
                                                                               String requestMethod,
                                                                               Map<String,String[]> requestParameterMap,
                                                                               String requestPathInfo,
                                                                               String requestPathTranslated,
                                                                               String requestProtocol,
                                                                               String requestQueryString,
                                                                               String requestRequestedSessionId,
                                                                               String requestURI,
                                                                               String requestScheme,
                                                                               String requestServletPath,
                                                                               Boolean requestIsSecure,
                                                                               String clientAddress,
                                                                               String clientHostName,
                                                                               Integer clientPort,
                                                                               Integer responseBufferSize,
                                                                               String responseCharacterEncoding,
                                                                               String responseContentType,
                                                                               Map<String,String> responseHeaders,
                                                                               Boolean responseIsCommitted,
                                                                               Integer responseStatusCode)
                                                                        throws com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException
        Allows for the creation of a WebRequest transaction with all the relevant information.

        It is highly recommended to give as much information as possible, especially params marked as (useful), otherwise use null.

        The thrown exception must be handled as Exception, since the GateException hierarchy is not yet exposed in FRAPI.

        Example: http://localhost:8500/test/frapitest.cfm?q=a&x=y

        Parameters:
        trackInMetro - indicates if the transaction should be tracked in Metro
        requestURL - (useful - default transaction description) request URL without query string e.g. http://localhost:8500/test/frapitest.cfm (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getRequestURL)
        requestAttributes - servlet request attributes (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getAttribute)
        requestAuthType - name of auth scheme used e.g. BASIC_AUTH (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getAuthType)
        requestCharacterEncoding - name of character encoding used in request's body (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getCharacterEncoding)
        requestCookies - request cookie header string
        requestContentType - MIME type of request's body (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getContentType)
        requestContextPath - portion of request URI indicating request context (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getContextPath)
        requestContentLength - length of request body in bytes (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getContentLength)
        requestHeaders - map of request headers, name to value (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getHeader)
        requestLocale - preferred Locale for the client (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getLocale)
        requestMethod - (useful - default transaction sub flavor) HTTP method e.g. GET, POST, etc. (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getMethod)
        requestParameterMap - map of request parameters e.g. {q=[a],x=[y]} (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getParameterMap)
        requestPathInfo - any extra request path info - comes before the query string but after the servlet path in the URL (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getPathInfo)
        requestPathTranslated - extra request path info translated to a real path (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getPathTranslated)
        requestProtocol - (useful) name and version of request protocol e.g. HTTP/1.1 (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getProtocol)
        requestQueryString - (useful) request's query string contained in the URL e.g. q=a&x=y (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getQueryString)
        requestRequestedSessionId - session ID specified by the client (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getRequestedSessionId)
        requestURI - (useful) request URI e.g. /test/frapitest.cfm (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getrequestURI)
        requestScheme - (useful) request scheme e.g. http,https (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getScheme)
        requestServletPath - part of request URL that calls the servlet (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest#getServletPath)
        requestIsSecure - indicates if request was made using a secure channel like HTTPS (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#isSecure)
        clientAddress - (useful) IP address of the client that sent the request (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getRemoteAddr)
        clientHostName - fully qualified name of the client that sent the request (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getRemoteHost)
        clientPort - IP source port of the client that sent the request (see jakarta.servlet.ServletRequest#getRemotePort)
        responseBufferSize - actual buffer size used for the response (see jakarta.servlet.ServletResponse#getBufferSize)
        responseCharacterEncoding - MIME charset used for the response body e.g. UTF-8 (see jakarta.servlet.ServletResponse#getCharacterEncoding)
        responseContentType - content type used for the response body e.g. text/html; charset=UTF-8 (see jakarta.servlet.ServletResponse#getContentType)
        responseHeaders - map of request headers, name to value (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse#getHeader)
        responseIsCommitted - indicates the response had been committed (see jakarta.servlet.ServletResponse#isCommitted)
        responseStatusCode - (useful) status code of response e.g. 200, 404 (see jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse#getStatus)
        Returns:
        a BaseTransaction with the WebRequest flavor
        Throws:
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateTimeoutException - if the transaction timed out while traversing Transit input gates.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateRejectionException - if the transaction was rejected immediately by any Transit input gate.
        com.intergral.apm.transit.api.gate.GateException - if the transaction couldn't be created due to a Transit transaction gate refusing the request.
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • setTransactionProperty

        public abstract void setTransactionProperty​(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction txn,
                                            String propertyKey,
                                            Object propertyValue)
                                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Sets a property on a transaction.
        Parameters:
        txn - the transaction to set properties on
        propertyKey - string name of the property to set on the transaction
        propertyValue - value of property to set on the transaction
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if any of the arguments are null or if the property key is an empty string
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • setTransactionPropertyNoChecks

        public abstract void setTransactionPropertyNoChecks​(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction txn,
                                                    String propertyKey,
                                                    Object propertyValue)
        Sets a property on a transaction without validating arguments.

        Not recommended for use unless sure of values.

        Parameters:
        txn - the transaction to set properties on
        propertyKey - string name of the property to set on the transaction
        propertyValue - value of property to set on the transaction
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • setTransactionProperties

        public abstract void setTransactionProperties​(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction txn,
                                              Map<String,Object> properties)
                                       throws IllegalArgumentException
        Allows setting multiple properties on a transaction.

        Silently ignores null/empty objects.

        Parameters:
        txn - the transaction to set properties on
        properties - name-value map of properties to set on the transaction
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if any of the arguments are null
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • setTransactionPropertiesNoChecks

        public abstract void setTransactionPropertiesNoChecks​(com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction txn,
                                                      Map<String,Object> properties)
        Allows setting multiple properties on a transaction without validating arguments.

        Not recommended for use unless sure of values.

        Parameters:
        txn - the transaction to set properties on
        properties - name-value map of properties to set on the transaction
        Since:
        2025.1.0

      • getActiveTransaction

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction getActiveTransaction​()
        Get the current transaction on this thread.
        Returns:
        the current BaseTransaction on this thread or null if no transaction is active, for instance if the page is exempt from FusionReactor tracking by restrictions.
        Since:
        5.2.4

      • getActiveMasterTransaction

        public abstract com.intergral.apm.transit.txn.BaseTransaction getActiveMasterTransaction​()
        Get the master (root) transaction on this thread.
        Returns:
        the master BaseTransaction on this thread or null if no transaction is active.
        Since:
        5.2.4

      • setTransactionName

        public abstract void setTransactionName​(String name)
                                 throws IllegalStateException,
                                        IllegalArgumentException
        Set the transaction name for the master transaction on this thread.
        Parameters:
        name - name of the transaction
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if no transaction is active on this thread
        IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or is an empty string
        Since:
        6.0.0

      • setTransactionApplicationName

        public abstract void setTransactionApplicationName​(String name)
                                            throws IllegalStateException,
                                                   IllegalArgumentException
        Set the application name for the master transaction on this thread.
        Parameters:
        name - name of the application
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if no transaction is active on this thread
        IllegalArgumentException - if name is null or is an empty string
        Since:
        6.0.0

      • getObjectSize

        public abstract long getObjectSize​(Object objectToSize)
                            throws IllegalStateException
        Returns an implementation-specific approximation of the amount of storage consumed by the specified object. The result may include some or all of the object's overhead, and thus is useful for comparison within an implementation but not between implementations. The estimate may change during a single invocation of the JVM. Returns 0 if the supplied object is null.
        Parameters:
        objectToSize - the object to size
        Returns:
        an implementation-specific approximation of the amount of storage consumed by the specified object
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if Java Instrumentation is not available
        Since:
        5.1.0

      • getDeepObjectSize

        public abstract long getDeepObjectSize​(Object objectToSize)
                                throws IllegalStateException
        Returns an implementation-specific approximation of the total amount of storage consumed by the specified object by summing the storage recursively of it's fields. Objects encountered in fields are not summed twice. The result may include some or all of the object's overhead, and thus is useful for comparison within an implementation but not between implementations. The estimate may change during a single invocation of the JVM.
        Parameters:
        objectToSize - the object to size
        Returns:
        an implementation-specific approximation of the total amount of storage consumed by the specified object including recursive field storage. Returns 0 if the supplied object is null.
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if Java Instrumentation is not available
        RuntimeException - if a field on an object cannot be accessed
        Since:
        5.1.0

      • getFRVersion

        public abstract IVersion getFRVersion​()
        Returns an implementation of the IVersion interface to expose FusionReactor version information.
        Returns:
        an implementation of the IVersion interface. Will return null if a instance of IVersion cannot be found.
        Since:
        6.0.0

      • getClientId

        public abstract String getClientId​()
        Returns the current client ID. Be aware that this value can change.
        Returns:
        the current client ID for this instance. Will return null if unable to retrieve the client ID or if it hasn't been set yet.
        Since:
        2026.1.2

      • getSignalState

        public abstract ISignalState getSignalState​()
        Returns state information for data shipping.
        Returns:
        ISignalState instance providing signal state information. null if no state information is available.
        Since:
        2026.1.3

      • getLicenseState

        public abstract ILicenseState getLicenseState​()
        Returns state information for license.
        Returns:
        ILicenseState instance providing license state information. null if no state information is available.
        Since:
        2026.1.3

      • registerCallback

        public abstract IProbiCallback.ICallbackRegistration registerCallback​(IProbiCallback callback,
                                                                      long period)
        Register a callback for a sampler.
        Parameters:
        callback - the call back implementation you want to use.
        period - the period in milliseconds between calls. Minimum period of 1000 milliseconds. The stated period is not guaranteed to be accurate, and will be adjusted to the nearest second during calls. Any value that is not a multiple of 1000 will be rounded up to the next second.
        Returns:
        the registration for this call back

      • setSharedMap

        public static void setSharedMap​(Map map)
        Non-api: clients must not call this method.
        Parameters:
        map - the map that will be set as a shared map

      • getSharedMap

        public static Map getSharedMap​()
        Non-api: clients must not call this method.
        Returns:
        a Map representing the shared map
